error-text: The link has expired or has already been used.
title: Confirm your email
banner: Confirm your email address to save owned skins, create wishlists and share them. The email is on its way — check your Spam folder if you can't find it in your inbox.
resend-success: Email sent — check your inbox or Spam folder.
resend-error: Couldn't send the email. Please try again later.
email-body: Confirm your email address to unlock all features: mark skins as owned, create wishlists and manage them.
email-action: Click the button below to confirm your email. The link is valid for 24 hours.
email-ignore: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
